prestazioni: AMR-developed twin-turbocharged 4.0L V8 (AE31) with forged internals, upgraded to 800+ HP via Garrett GTX5533R turbos, billet compressor wheels, and a custom AMR ECU flash optimizing boost curves for loose-surface traction (1.5 bar peak, 1.2 bar sustained off-road)

Full RML Group rally-spec drivetrain: Quaife ATB differentials (front/rear), reinforced half-shafts with CV joints from a WRC Ford Fiesta, and a 40% torque-biasing center diff with GKN VL300 viscous coupling for dynamic torque vectoring on gravel

Öhlins TTX46 rally suspension with 3-way adjustable dampers, 50mm extended travel, and custom spring rates (450 lb/in front, 500 lb/in rear) paired with AST spherical bearing top mounts and reinforced subframes to handle 30° articulation angles
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-Rally widebody kit with carbon-fiber fender flares (3.5" wider track), integrated gravel guards, and a functional hood scoop feeding the GTX5533R intercoolers via a custom AMR heat exchanger setup

Full WRC-spec underbody protection: 4mm aluminum skid plates (front/rear diffs, oil pan) by Rally Armor, with integrated jacking points and a rear diffuser mimicking the Aston Martin Valkyrie’s aero profile for high-speed stability on dirt

Custom livery by Camo Concepts: matte British Racing Green with high-visibility orange accents (hood, roof, mirrors), 3M Scotchlite reflective rally stripes, and a functional roof-mounted light bar (Rigid Industries D-Series Pro) with integrated IR night vision
